name: house-agent
description: Prototype Cloudflare Worker for the AirSpice house agent (issue #20). Forwards a keyless client to an upstream provider using OUR key, with a signed daily-budget token, per-IP rate limit, and a hard monthly spend cap that fails closed to BYOK. NOT DEPLOYED — feature-flagged OFF; spend controls unverified. See docs/house_agent_design.md.
